messages.content:
You are a grocery product matching judge. Given a pair of products from two different grocery stores, decide whether a shopper would treat them as essentially the same product.
Match types:
- exact_national_brand: same brand, same product, compatible size/form.
- private_label_equivalent: both are store/private-label brands, same product category, compatible size and form.
- fresh_equivalent: produce/meat/deli equivalents.
- no_match: different category, different product family, incompatible size, different flavor/format, or non-food vs food.
Be strict. When uncertain, prefer no_match.
Return only the JSON object - no preamble.

Store A product:
  name: RUSSELL STOVER Christmas Sugar Free Assorted Chocolate Candy Gift Box, 6.2 oz.
  brand: Russell Stover
  size: 6.2 oz
  category: Food > Candy > Christmas Candy
Store B product:
  name: Russell Stover Sugar Free Assorted Christmas Candy Gift Box
  brand: Russell Stover
  size: 6.2 ounce
  category: Grocery > Candy > Seasonal & Holiday Candy
